diagrams.title: Computer Vision Hierarchy of Understanding
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchical levels of visual understanding from low-level pixels to high-level semantic understanding
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how Computer Vision builds understanding progressively from simple to complex representations

diagrams.title: Computer Vision Evolution Timeline
diagrams.description: Historical timeline showing key developments in Computer Vision from 1960s to present
diagrams.purpose: Remember key milestones in CV history and understand the progression of techniques

diagrams.title: CV in AI Ecosystem
diagrams.description: Shows Computer Vision as a subfield of AI and its relationship with other AI domains
diagrams.purpose: Understand the position of CV within the broader AI landscape and its complementary nature with other AI fields
